programme.desc: Storie, notizie, analisi, per raccontare ogni giorno tutto ciò che accade fuori dai confini italiani. Fatti apparentemente lontani che ci riguardano sempre di più, quotidianamente.

programme.desc: Il volo Korean Air 801 si schianta a cinque chilometri dalla destinazione.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo 101 si prepara al decollo nelle acque al largo di Miami Beach, in Florida.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo RIA 593 da Mosca a Hong Kong precipita dal cielo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un jet privato viene scosso da un violento impatto sopra la foresta amazzonica.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo United Airlines 1549 collide con uno stormo di uccelli.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Durante condizioni meteorologiche estreme, un elicottero compie un viaggio di routine.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Una breve tratta si trasforma rapidamente in un incubo per l’equipaggio e i passeggeri a bordo del volo 243.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Otto giocatori del Manchester United muoiono in un noto incidente aereo a Monaco.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo United Airlines 232 subisce un grave guasto quando uno dei motori esplode.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un traghetto greco si schianta contro una gigantesca roccia.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Gli investigatori sospettano inizialmente la presenza di una bomba a bordo del volo Continental Express 2574.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: I piloti sono diretti a Phoenix, in Arizona, ma prima devono trovare la loro pista.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Una rivisitazione di cinque disastri aerei fondamentali e dei cambiamenti che hanno provocato.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Delta Airlines 191 raggiunge la soglia dell’aeroporto di Dallas Fort Worth.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Due aerei si scontrano in volo e si schiantano in una tranquilla periferia di Los Angeles.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Air Inter 148 inizia la discesa verso l’aeroporto di Strasburgo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il racconto dello schianto del volo American Eagle 4184 vicino a Roselawn, Indiana.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: I voli United Airlines 585 e US Air 585 si schiantano a pochi anni di distanza l’uno dall’altro.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un aereo gira misteriosamente intorno all’aeroporto di Atene. Qual è l’enigma del volo 522?

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Air France 358 prende fuoco quando esce di pista.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo FedEx 705 ha appena terminato la fase di salita da Memphis quando inizia l’attacco.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo ASA 529 perde una delle sue quattro eliche mentre è in viaggio verso Gulfport, Mississippi.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il motore destro del volo Tuninter 1153 si guasta improvvisamente.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo British Airways 38 subisce un guasto inspiegabile.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo 708 sta attraversando un uragano moderato quando l’aereo precipita.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Pan Am 103 esplode improvvisamente nei cieli sopra Lockerbie, in Scozia.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Rivivi l’incredibile storia di un pilota costretto a far planare in sicurezza un 767 senza motori.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Southern Airways 242 entra in una violenta tempesta.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Crossair 3597 è in fase di avvicinamento finale, ma poco prima dell’atterraggio non trova la pista.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: È esplosa una bomba e l’aereo ha subito gravi danni.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo RIA 593 da Mosca a Hong Kong precipita dal cielo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Avianca Airlines 52 sta volando in un cielo sereno quando viene messo nel suo primo circuito di attesa

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: “Fatti a Pezzi” ripercorre alcuni dei più spettacolari disastri aerei.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un forte tonfo proviene dalla fusoliera e i piloti interrompono il decollo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un operatore radar militare identifica erroneamente un aereo civile in avvicinamento come un F-14 ostile.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: “Cruel Skies” ripercorre quattro disastri aerei cruciali e mancate tragedie.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Minuti dopo il decollo, la coda del gigantesco Boeing 747 si stacca.

programme.desc: Il volo Korean Air 801 si schianta a cinque chilometri dalla destinazione.

programme.desc: Il volo Air India 182 scompare improvvisamente dal radar.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo PSA 182 si scontra con un Cessna e entrambi gli aerei precipitano.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: I piloti riescono a compiere uno degli atterraggi più straordinari della storia.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo SAS 686 decolla nella fitta nebbia dell’aeroporto di Linate, a Milano.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Negli ultimi secondi del volo, l’aereo precipita improvvisamente dal cielo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo 401 ha tre luci verdi che confermano il carrello bloccato, ma ne funzionano solo due.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Un aereo che trasporta un gruppo di scolari è su una rotta di collisione con un aereo cargo della DHL.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo
programme.desc: Il volo Korean Airlines 007 vola alto sopra il Mar del Giappone con 269 persone a bordo.

programme.title: Mayday: Disastro Aereo

programme.desc: Durante il trasferimento di bimbi vietnamiti orfani da Saigon verso la salvezza, tutto va terribilmente storto

programme.title: Today’s Top Pick
programme.desc: Documentaries in this slot are rebroadcasts of our most-viewed and most popular stories of the season. They feature important social, economic, environmental or other policy-driven issues, affecting lives nationwide or simply in one small village. A broad selection of top productions by Chinese top documentary producers.

programme.title: Humanities and Geography
programme.desc: A strand devoted to the nature and wildlife of China, the people who lived alongside them, and the great and diverse landscapes with which they all contend.

programme.title: Living China
programme.desc: Real life stories told from the personal perspective. Moving, dramatic, sorrows and joys, expressed emphatically and expressed quietly. Watch closely to see and understand the real China as it is lived.

programme.title: Special Edition
programme.desc: Prestige Chinese documentary production, tackling serious subjects with the best cinematography, editing, and all round production values with a unique Chinese perspective.

programme.title: Journeys and Discoveries
programme.desc: A documentary series showcasing the history of China and its people.

programme.title: History in the Frame
programme.desc: A documentary series featuring historical and archaeological exploration.

programme.title: Best Eats
programme.desc: Food connects people! A feast for the eyes that spotlights the cuisines of China in a way that’s bound to set the mouths of the whole globe watering!

programme.title: Youthful China
programme.desc: The youth of a country is the future of that country. A series of documentaries focusing on the younger generation of China in which you get to see what they are achieving and what makes them tick!

programme.title: Pixel Collage
programme.desc: A well-crafted collage of selected short documentaries telling stories about all aspects of China! People, technology, culture, and wildlife, all are showcased in Internet-friendly form.

programme.title: Survive the Wild - S01:E06 - Devious Defenses
programme.desc: Animals can employ a number of different defenses in order to withstand an attack. Some seek safety in herds, some hide in plain sight, some meet aggression with even stronger aggression, and some build fortresses. Whatever the strategy it is clear that animals will do whatever it takes to survive the wild.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E27 - Diana And Sarah The Royal Wives Of Windsor Part 1
programme.desc: As royal wives, both Diana and Fergie experienced a life filled with loneliness and sadness, despite their high hopes of bringing change to the House of Windsor. What was supposed to be their 'fairy-tale' lives ended up being far from that reality.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E28 - Diana And Sarah The Royal Wives Of Windsor Part 2
programme.desc: Diana, Princess of Wales, and Sarah, Duchess of York both married into the Queen's family, leaving in the midst of scandals, though their exits were quite different. Sadly, Diana passed away, while Sarah survived to start anew. Over time, their struggles can be better understood, and this documentary explores those challenges...

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Uncharted - S01:E02 - Meateaters
programme.desc: Papua New Guinea Pt2. Jim brings meat to the local village while Corey explores leech infested swamps looking for the local deer. Local villagers tell Jim of a remote area 400 miles away where buffalo roam.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E05 - Wardens Instinct
programme.desc: There is often a fine line between false information and the truth. Veteran Region 5 wardens use their sixth sense to bring game violators to justice.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E06 - Fourth Dimension
programme.desc: Fourth of July in Montana's Flathead Lake is where the party is at. But with the heat tempers flare and the free flowing alcohol combines to make a dangerous situation.

programme.title: The New Frontier - S02:E07 - Danger Asteroids Ahead
programme.desc: The question often rises is the cost of space exploration really worth it? Could the money be better spent elsewhere. If so one space program would have to remain. The planetary defence program, to locate identify and deflect a wayward asteroid from hitting Earth and destroying our civilzation because at last count there were 15,000 possible dangerous candidates close to Earth.

programme.title: The New Frontier - S02:E08 - First Light
programme.desc: For an instrument first developed as recently as the 17th century, the telescope has travelled a long way. The latest version of the once-humble telescope will be going a lot farther – carrying us ever closer to the first light that ever bathed the Universe in which we live.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S02:E05 - Ex-Men The Origins of Terry
programme.desc: Terry and Larry test a scene for X-Men Origins by attempting to split an oncoming AK-47 bullet with a Samurai Sword.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S02:E06 - Pay Terry Back
programme.desc: Terry and Larry put Mel Gibson's film PAYBACK, to the test.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E33 - Prince Edward and Sophie Rhys-Jones
programme.desc: The Real Story takes us inside a simple royal love tale. It offers a glimpse behind the scenes of how a Prince ended up falling for a girl from a regular middle-class family.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E27 - Diana And Sarah The Royal Wives Of Windsor Part 1
programme.desc: As royal wives, both Diana and Fergie experienced a life filled with loneliness and sadness, despite their high hopes of bringing change to the House of Windsor. What was supposed to be their 'fairy-tale' lives ended up being far from that reality.

programme.desc: Terry and Larry put Mel Gibson's film PAYBACK, to the test.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E33 - Prince Edward and Sophie Rhys-Jones
programme.desc: The Real Story takes us inside a simple royal love tale. It offers a glimpse behind the scenes of how a Prince ended up falling for a girl from a regular middle-class family.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E27 - Diana And Sarah The Royal Wives Of Windsor Part 1
programme.desc: As royal wives, both Diana and Fergie experienced a life filled with loneliness and sadness, despite their high hopes of bringing change to the House of Windsor. What was supposed to be their 'fairy-tale' lives ended up being far from that reality.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E28 - Diana And Sarah The Royal Wives Of Windsor Part 2
programme.desc: Diana, Princess of Wales, and Sarah, Duchess of York both married into the Queen's family, leaving in the midst of scandals, though their exits were quite different. Sadly, Diana passed away, while Sarah survived to start anew. Over time, their struggles can be better understood, and this documentary explores those challenges...

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Uncharted - S01:E02 - Meateaters
programme.desc: Papua New Guinea Pt2. Jim brings meat to the local village while Corey explores leech infested swamps looking for the local deer. Local villagers tell Jim of a remote area 400 miles away where buffalo roam.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E05 - Wardens Instinct
programme.desc: There is often a fine line between false information and the truth. Veteran Region 5 wardens use their sixth sense to bring game violators to justice.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E06 - Fourth Dimension
programme.desc: Fourth of July in Montana's Flathead Lake is where the party is at. But with the heat tempers flare and the free flowing alcohol combines to make a dangerous situation.

programme.title: The New Frontier - S02:E07 - Danger Asteroids Ahead
programme.desc: The question often rises is the cost of space exploration really worth it? Could the money be better spent elsewhere. If so one space program would have to remain. The planetary defence program, to locate identify and deflect a wayward asteroid from hitting Earth and destroying our civilzation because at last count there were 15,000 possible dangerous candidates close to Earth.

programme.title: The New Frontier - S02:E08 - First Light
programme.desc: For an instrument first developed as recently as the 17th century, the telescope has travelled a long way. The latest version of the once-humble telescope will be going a lot farther – carrying us ever closer to the first light that ever bathed the Universe in which we live.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S02:E05 - Ex-Men The Origins of Terry
programme.desc: Terry and Larry test a scene for X-Men Origins by attempting to split an oncoming AK-47 bullet with a Samurai Sword.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S02:E06 - Pay Terry Back
programme.desc: Terry and Larry put Mel Gibson's film PAYBACK, to the test.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E33 - Prince Edward and Sophie Rhys-Jones
programme.desc: The Real Story takes us inside a simple royal love tale. It offers a glimpse behind the scenes of how a Prince ended up falling for a girl from a regular middle-class family.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E27 - Diana And Sarah The Royal Wives Of Windsor Part 1
programme.desc: As royal wives, both Diana and Fergie experienced a life filled with loneliness and sadness, despite their high hopes of bringing change to the House of Windsor. What was supposed to be their 'fairy-tale' lives ended up being far from that reality.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E28 - Diana And Sarah The Royal Wives Of Windsor Part 2

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Uncharted - S01:E02 - Meateaters

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E05 - Wardens Instinct
programme.desc: There is often a fine line between false information and the truth. Veteran Region 5 wardens use their sixth sense to bring game violators to justice.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E34 - Prince William And Prince Harry The Next Royal Generation
programme.desc: Prince William and Prince Harry, along with their friends, got as much media attention as today’s pop stars, fashion icons, and movie celebs. This documentary explores how this affected their personal lives and friendships, showcasing how they managed their fame alongside their royal responsibilities.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E35 - Prince Charles At 50 Heir To Sadness
programme.desc: After Diana's death, everyone's attention turned to Charles, who was not only a widower and a dad but also next in line for the throne. This show takes a closer look at how he got along with his sons, his longtime love Camilla, and what his future might look like as King. Royal experts David Starkey and Anthony Holden share their insights.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Uncharted - S01:E03 - End Game
programme.desc: Papua New Guinea Pt3. Jim and Corey split up and search for buffalo. Jim, unable to reach Corey by radio, hears several shots from Corey's direction and heads out to search for his friend.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E07 - Behind The Shed
programme.desc: When the game ranges are opened up for Antler Shed Hunting, it's all hands on deck for the Montana Game Wardens. Reports of bears, mountain lions and lost hunters keep the wardens busy.

programme.title: Wardens - S05:E08 - Fun In The Sun
programme.desc: When jet skis get too close to boats things can turn dangerous. And Warden Bryan Golie questions an angler in search for the truth.

programme.title: The New Frontier - S02:E09 - Stars Above
programme.desc: Stars are a bit like human beings. They can be warm or cold, they come in all kinds of shapes and sizes... and, let’s face it, they can be dim or bright. And recent discoveries suggest that the number of stars in our galaxy alone, the Milky Way, may exceed 200 billion. Just what are these citizens of the night sky?

programme.title: The New Frontier - S02:E10 - The Dark Side
programme.desc: Perhaps that American politician was right. There are indeed things we know we don’t know. For instance, cosmologically speaking, we know we don’t know much – and certainly not nearly enough – about two of the enduring mysteries of the Universe. Dark Matter and Dark Energy, it’s little wonder that scientists are devoting so much grey matter and energy of their own to finding out as much as they can.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S02:E07 - Paint Your Red River Stagecoach at High Noon
programme.desc: Terry and Larry put a few common scenes from old westerns to the test.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons - S02:E08 - Terry's Underworld
programme.desc: Terry and Larry test a scene from the film Underworld.

programme.desc: Sarah Ferguson, once known as the Duchess of York, seemed to have everything, but her world turned upside down when her name got caught up in a big scandal.

programme.desc: What good is the warmth of summer, without the cold of the Winter.

programme.title: Viral Wild
programme.desc: Far from the reaches of human society, the animal kingdom thrives.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: Mark and Jaclyn make their annual trek to Tornado Alley and this time they are looking for more than severe thunderstorms and tornadoes. They also want answers as to whether Climate Change is causing changes to Tornado Alley.

programme.title: Storm Hunters
programme.desc: George joins Mark and Jaclyn on a journey to Nepal.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: George investigates the wild side of water in dangerous class 5 river rapids.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Mount Washington, New Hampshire has the dubious title of being home to the world’s worst weather. The highest wind ever recorded on the planet – 231 miles per hour – was recorded at its mountaintop observatory. To prepare for a mid-winter assault on the summit, Angry Planet host George Kourounis becomes a “human popsicle”, encased in ice in at the National Resarch Council’s high speed wind tunnel. Then he and his sidekick Mark Robinson climb to the top of the mountain in mid-January and brave their way into a summit blizzard.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: Dominica, the most volcanic and mountainous island in the Caribbean, is home to the Boiling Lake, a large waterfall-fed lake of furiously boiling water. Adventurer George Kourounis becomes the first person ever to traverse across the lake on a rope, risking his life to take water samples and shoot video from a place no human has ever been. He then dives to the ocean floor off the coast of the island to explore vents where the superheated water bubbles into the ocean.

programme.title: Angry Planet
programme.desc: One of the most exciting episodes of season one is “Wild Water” – our look at Great White Sharks, water-filled caves and high voltage marine action.

programme.title: Angry Planet

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: James Kenneth Elmen Jr. rapì Julie Estes, allora 21enne, dal minimarket di Southside dove lavorava nel 1985. La violentò e la uccise. Il suo corpo fu ritrovato il giorno dopo, ma l'omicidio rimase irrisolto fino al 2003.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La vittima era un self-made man che non ha mai usato mezzi termini. Forse è stato assassinato da un cliente o da un dipendente insoddisfatto. Forse le foto audaci nella sua cassaforte contenevano l'indizio per risolvere il crimine.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La polizia ricava un indizio su una coppia scomparsa nel weekend del Memorial Day durante una rapina in corso. Le prove trovate risolvono un crimine brutale.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: L'assassino probabilmente sperava di coprire le proprie tracce inscenando la scena del crimine. Ma gli investigatori hanno visto il tentativo quasi subito e si sono rivolti alla scienza forense per scoprire cosa è realmente accaduto quella notte.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2001, Ginger Hayes e suo figlio Nicholas furono rapiti durante un furto d'auto e il crimine fu denunciato da un testimone pochi minuti dopo l'accaduto.

programme.desc: Quando un'insegnante devota e rispettata scomparve, la polizia dovette determinare se fosse andata in vacanza senza dirlo a nessuno o se fosse stata vittima di un crimine.

programme.desc: Un triangolo amoroso diventato fatale sembra chiuso fino a quando la tecnologia non ne racconta la storia.

programme.desc: A suitcase leads to the gruesome discovery of a nearly perfect crime, leaving investigators feeling confused.

programme.desc: Quando una studentessa universitaria risulta scomparsa, la polizia crede che l'indagine sarà come tante altre. Ma quando scoprono schizzi di sangue nella camera da letto del suo ragazzo, capiscono che questo caso sarà diverso.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Un dottorando dell'Università Statale del Michigan scomparve e venne creduto morto. Con l'aiuto di un professore di scienze geologiche, la polizia sperava di trovare del "marcio" sul suo assassino.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2007, la casa mobile di Effie e Michael Ratley prese fuoco e Michael salvò la moglie e il figlio neonato.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Un serial killer era a piede libero e la polizia doveva trovarlo prima che colpisse di nuovo. La sua pista più promettente era insolita: un'impronta insanguinata sul corpo di una delle vittime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2007, Brian e Beverly Mauck furono trovati morti nella loro casa a Graham, Washington. Con un'impronta palmare insanguinata e impronte di scarpe, gli inquirenti si focalizzarono su Daniel Tavares, che in passato aveva tatuato la schiena a Brian.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Due sospetti che convivono sono stati collegati a un omicidio per stivali macchiati di sangue e una pistola.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Un'auto crivellata di colpi, un autista scomparso e nessun testimone. Fu un agguato o un attacco casuale?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2003, Kathy Lorick fu assassinata su una pista da jogging di Concord, in California, in pieno giorno mentre parlava con suo marito al cellulare.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2006, Darlene VanderGiesen ricevette e-mail minacciose e poi scomparve. Il monitoraggio della fonte delle e-mail portò la polizia a casa di Daphne Wright, dove credono sia stato commesso un omicidio.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: La donna sul retro del camion agitava le braccia e urlava. Pensavano stesse facendo qualcosa di pericoloso per il gusto di farlo. Ma quando trovarono una giacca vicino a una pozza di sangue, capirono che ciò che avevano visto non era una scorribanda.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Il miglioramento digitale del video di sicurezza rivela che ciò che sembra un incontro casuale è in realtà un sequestro che porta all'omicidio. Gli inquirenti sospettano che i crimini non siano casuali e temono che vi sia un serial killer in libertà.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2006, la politica del Nevada Kathy Augustine morì misteriosamente in un'accanita campagna di rielezione e il medico legale non riuscì né ad individuare la causa di morte né a spiegare le piccole ferite da puntura scoperte durante l'autopsia.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nella notte di Halloween del 2004, Adriane Insogna e Leslie Mazzara furono brutalmente uccise nella loro casa di Napa, in California.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Nel 2008, in Illinois i soccorsi giunsero in un incendio in un box e videro un uomo compresso sotto un camion.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quanto può essere sfortunato un uomo? Sua moglie si è tolta la vita e la sua fidanzata del college si uccise allo stesso modo quattordici anni prima. Gli investigatori dovevano stabilire se si trattasse solo di una strana coincidenza o di un delitto.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Quando una giovane ragazza venne trovata morta, la polizia arrestò subito il sospetto più probabile. Ma la tecnologia all'avanguardia della NASA permise a un odontoiatra forense di dimostrare che dietro le sbarre vi era l'uomo sbagliato.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli chef devono creare dei pasti per un Bar Mitzvah.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli chef hanno 20 minuti per preparare delle tapas usando gli avanzi del precedente servizio.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: In questo episodio di "Hell's Kitchen", Mara Maionchi e Frank Matano si uniscono alle squadre Rossa e Blu. Prima del servizio, i cuochi affrontano un esercizio di comunicazione: bendati o imbavagliati, devono replicare un piatto dello Chef Cracco.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Il ristorante ospita Chef Kumalé, esperto di cucina etnica, per il primo test. Le brigate devono preparare menu con piatti di street food.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Lo chef Cracco valuta la capacità di mescolare cucine straniere e italiane. L'immunità dall'eliminazione è in palio per un servizio con lo chef Pedro Miguel Schiaffino, esperto di cucina peruviana. Tre nuovi piatti vengono aggiunti al menu.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: L'ospite al ristorante di Carlo Cracco è l'esperto Carlo Spinelli, che porta ingredienti insoliti come fiori, alghe, sali stranieri e insetti. I cuochi affrontano l'ardua sfida di creare un piatto con questi ingredienti, mettendoli in difficoltà con un menu azzardato per il pranzo.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: I cuochi delle due brigate trascorrono un pomeriggio avventuroso nella campagna pavese, raccogliendo ingredienti e cucinando in situazioni estreme per creare un piatto gourmet. Lo chef Cracco incontra i cuochi individualmente per valutarli e decidere l'immunità, mentre due chef prendono la guida della propria brigata.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Il team affronta una prova del palato per identificare cibi diversi solo con l'assaggio.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: La squadra prepara un piatto speciale a base di granchio reale.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Ogni chef prepara un piatto usando 14 ingredienti specifici.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I concorrenti fanno una gita al Borgata Hotel e Casino.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Per aumentare la motivazione, Ramsay dà agli chef un set di pentole in acciaio inossidabile.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Gli chef preparano dei piatti per cento ospiti misteriosi.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I due concorrenti rimasti volano ancora una volta al Borgata di Atlantic City.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Il vincitore della quinta stagione di Hell's Kitchen viene annunciato.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: 17 chef competono per una posto di primo chef a Whistler, Canada.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: La sfida di oggi sta nel preparare un piatto perfetto di gamberi per il servizio della sera dopo.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Ce la faranno i team a servire un pasto di prima mattina per un gruppo di duri vigili del fuoco?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Il primo compito dei concorrenti è di preparare delle salsicce prima del servizio serale.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I cuochi devono preparare un pasto per un Marine di ritorno dall'Iraq.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I team devono creare un pasto di tre portate con meno di 700 calorie.

programme.desc: I gruppi hanno una sfida alfabetica per vincere un viaggio a Las Vegas.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I team sono sottoposti a un assaggio alla cieca per vincere un pasto in un ristorante di Santa Monica.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: Questo episodio è caratterizzato da un tema francese, nella sfida e nel servizio serale.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: La sfida per i team è creare tre piatti utilizzando ingredienti canadesi.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I cuochi rimasti si uniscono per creare un team.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: La sfida per i cuochi rimasti è di lavorare sulle loro capacità di presentazione.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I quattro cuochi rimasti devono preparare piatti vegetariani per 80 ospiti speciali.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Come primo test, i cuochi devono creare un piatto ispirato a un giocattolo. La squadra blu vince. Nel servizio del pranzo, i clienti votano i menu tramite un'app, ma nonostante sia il più popolare, il menu rosso riceve meno stelle, causando la sconfitta della squadra.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: I 6 chef rimanenti si avvicinano alla giacca nera. Nel primo test, preparano risotti che riflettono la loro identità, mentre Guglielmo e Shaban emergono come i migliori dei loro team. Guglielmo ottiene la prima giacca nera. Durante il servizio, i cuochi sono osservati da Bottura e alla fine, le giacche nere rimanenti vengono consegnate a Carlotta, Shaban, Kristian e Amalia in questo ordine.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Dopo una serata di "eccessi", i cuochi devono preparare piatti detox con Pierangelo Dacrema come ospite. Nel primo servizio con la giacca nera, i migliori cuochi delle prime due edizioni di "Hell's Kitchen Italia" sfidano i concorrenti con un menu dei migliori piatti delle tre edizioni.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Cracco porta i cuochi al refettorio di Bottura per preparare un menu anti-spreco. Durante il servizio serale, devono servire un banchetto con tutti i piatti usciti contemporaneamente per ogni portata, ma tutto va male e nessun immune è al sicuro.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen Italy
programme.desc: Gli ultimi quattro cuochi devono affrontare quattro modi diversi di intendere la cucina. Durante il servizio, ciascuno di loro deve dimostrare le capacità di leadership a turno, con Mirko che assume il comando della brigata.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: La sfida per i concorrenti rimasti sta nel preparare piatti cinesi, indiani e messicani.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: I cuochi eliminati in precedenza tornano per aiutare i due finalisti a preparare i loro menu.

programme.desc: I concorrenti sono svegliati all'alba per preparare quattro diversi piatti a base di uova.

programme.title: La Storia Infinita
programme.desc: Tratto dal bestseller mondiale di Michael Ende, "La storia infinita" è l'odissea di un bambino catapultato in un mondo senza tempo popolato da creature fantastiche che solo lui può salvare.

programme.title: Zip & Zap - Il club delle biglie
programme.desc: Dopo essere stati sorpresi a rubare le risposte del test scolastico, i gemelli Zip e Zap sono costretti per punizione a trascorrere l’estate in un rigido istituto dove è vietato ogni tipo di divertimento.

programme.title: La programmazione riprenderà a breve
programme.desc: Ci stiamo concedendo un sonno riparatore per tornare più belli di prima! Resta sintonizzato e presto arriveranno altre proposte straordinarie di intrattenimento a cura di Rakuten TV.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Il nuovo amico peloso e lanuginoso di Tontolone causa molti problemi nel villaggio dei Puffi con le sue abitudini alimentari e riproduttive. Nel frattempo, un folletto dei boschi regala a Puffetta un paio di scarpe da ballo con un sinistro segreto.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Forzuto vorrebbe essare un cavaliere valoroso. Quando un grosso drago dà fuoco alla foresta e al villaggio, decide di partire per sconfiggerlo.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Tontolone e Puffetta cadono nelle grinfie di un uomo malvagio che li vuole far esibire nel suo spettacolo itinerante.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Puffo Poeta e Puffo Pittore non si sentono apprenzzati dagli altri Puffi e decidono di andarsene. Nel loro viaggio si imbattono nel perfido Gargamella ma per fortuna Grande Puffo corre in loro aiuto.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: I Puffi adorano i tartufi, ma i tartufi appartengono ai Trolls. E i Trolls vivono ai peidi del Monte Tratufo nel cui largo si nasconde la terribile Cosa senza Nome.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Grande Puffo si innamora di una ninfa dei boschi di nome Campanellina, ignaro del fatto che il suo fascino seducente fa parte di un complotto ordito da Baldassarre per catturare tutti gli animali del bosco, nel suo ultimo piano per rovesciare Lord Homnibus e governare il regno con mano autocratica.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Grande Puffo ricorda l'emozionante viaggio di Sognatore in alto mare e le sue avvincenti avventure con tartarughe marine, balene, isole deserte... e pirati!

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Hogartha si traveste da Premio Puffo d'Oro per catturare i Puffi e usarli come ingrediente principale nella sua crema di bellezza.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Grande Puffo organizza un equipaggio per salpare verso l'isola delle Puffbacche perché Gargamella ha teso una trappola uccidendo tutti gli alberi della terraferma tranne uno.

programme.title: Air Bud 2 - Eroe a Quattro Zampe
programme.desc: Buddy ha un altro asso nella zampa — il football. Quando il padrone di Buddy improvvisamente diventa quarterback nella sua scuola, anche Buddy si ritrova nella mischia! L’accoppiata esplosiva di Buddy e Josh aiuta a portare i Timberwolves al Campionato statale.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia: Festival of Fun
programme.desc: Unitevi a Barbie e alla sua sorellina Chelsea nel meraviglioso viaggio attraverso il magico mondo di Dreamtopia, una nuova e speciale avventura animata!

programme.title: Alpha & Omega
programme.desc: Due giovani lupi in contrasto l'uno con l'altro si trovano a doversi alleare per far fronte alla situazione sfavorevole nella quale sono finiti

programme.title: Giotto, l'amico dei pinguini
programme.desc: Giotto è un simpatico cagnolone, un bellissimo e dolcissimo pastore maremmano. Scodinzola per l’incantevole cittadina di Warrnambool, una località sul mare in Australia. Nella fattoria del suo padrone Swampy, ognuno ha il suo compito, e quello di Giotto è di fare la guardia alle galline.

programme.title: La Storia Infinita
programme.desc: Tratto dal bestseller mondiale di Michael Ende, "La storia infinita" è l'odissea di un bambino catapultato in un mondo senza tempo popolato da creature fantastiche che solo lui può salvare.

programme.title: Il mio piccolo dinosauro
programme.desc: Il giovane Jake cresce in un borgo dove non accade mai nulla di eccitante. Un giorno il ragazzino si ritrova in camera un piccolo dinosauro blu che diventa il suo nuovo meraviglioso amico.

programme.title: Air Buddies - Cuccioli Alla Riscossa
programme.desc: E' arrivata la nuova generazione del famoso franchise di successo Air Bud! Questa volta i protagonisti sono u cinque cuccioli di Air Bud, i Buddies, impegnati in una missione di salvataggio per salvare i loro genitori.

programme.title: Mr. Magorium e la bottega
programme.desc: Molly Mahoney è la goffa e insicura della Bottega delle Meraviglie di Mr. Magorium, il negozio di giocattoli più strano e fantastico del mondo.

programme.title: Jack Il Primate Più Verticale 2
programme.desc: Dopo essere stato cacciato dalla squadra di hockey, Jack incontra Ben, uno skateboarder ambizioso. Ben scopre che Jack è molto abile con lo skateboard e i due decidono di partecipare a una competizione di skateboard in giro per il paese!

programme.title: The Last Warrior - La spada magica
programme.desc: La pace e la tranquillità si sono insediate a Belogoria. Il male è stato sconfitto e Ivan si sta godendo la meritata fama.

programme.title: Spymate
programme.desc: Minkey, una super scimmia addestrata come spia, fa squadra con il suo ex partner Mike per salvare la figlia di Mike dalle grinfie di uno scienziato malvagio.

programme.title: Air Bud 2 - Eroe a Quattro Zampe
programme.desc: Buddy ha un altro asso nella zampa — il football. Quando il padrone di Buddy improvvisamente diventa quarterback nella sua scuola, anche Buddy si ritrova nella mischia! L’accoppiata esplosiva di Buddy e Josh aiuta a portare i Timberwolves al Campionato statale.

programme.title: Chestnut - Un eroe a quattro zampe
programme.desc: Le giovani sorelle orfane Sal e Rae pensano di aver fatto centro quando trovano un adorabile cucciolo di alano il giorno stesso in cui vengono informate che saranno adottate... ma presto scopriranno che nel loro nuovo elegante appartamento a Manhattan i cani non sono ammessi.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Hogartha promette a Gargamella un fischietto magico se lui le presenterà lo stregone dei suoi sogni. | Quattrocchi convince i Puffi a fabbricare una campana e a metterla ad Azrael per avvertirli quando il gatto è vicino.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Forzuto si veste come Puffetta per attirare uno gnomo innamorato, Piltkin, lontano dal villaggio. | Hogartha ottiene gli orecchini magici, che le permettono di sentire le voci dei Puffi da lontano.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Una bella principessa viene trasformata in una strega e ha bisogno dei baffi di un gatto e della lacrima di un Puffo per l'antidoto. | Grande Puffo riceve la ricetta per fare un arcobaleno da Madre Natura.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Un drago terrorizza il villaggio e l'unica soluzione è sostituire gli Occhi dell'Idolo. | L'Uomo nella Luna si dimette perché si sente poco apprezzato. Il festival della luna dei Puffi lo attirerà di nuovo?

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Quattrocchi e Tontolone competono in una gara di pan di zenzero che produce alcune ricette insolite. | I compagni Puffi di Tontolone sono curiosi di sapere cosa ha desiderato dopo aver gettato il penny di Gargamella nel pozzo.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Invidioso dell'attenzione che Vanitoso riceve per un dito del piede rotto, Burlone finge di essere malato. | Ancora alle prese con un livido dovuto al suo tentativo di catturare un Puffo, Gargamella promette a Esmeralda un sacco d'oro se lei lo aiuterà.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Il Villaggio dei Puffi riceve un orologio e Quattrocchi progetta un programma in modo che i Puffi siano più efficienti. | Quando Forzuto si rompe una gamba, impara cosa significa essere disabile.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Quattrocchi sfida Tuffy a dipingere le unghie dei piedi di Bocca Grande al pigiamino party di Pigrone. | I Puffi organizzano una gara automobilistica per determinare il miglior modello di automobile per il super impegnato Inventore.

programme.title: I Puffi
programme.desc: Inventore e Golosone aprono una gelateria. | Degli alieni chiamati Grimeys sono bloccati vicino al Villaggio dei Puffi finché non riparano la loro nave rotta

programme.title: The Duke - Il Duca
programme.desc: Quando Hubert, il fedele compagno a quattro zampe del Duca di Dingwall, eredita le proprietà del Duca, fa squadra con la nipote del Maggiordomo per contrastare alcuni avidi parenti del caro estinto.

programme.desc: Kacie, una ragazza dallo spirito ribelle, trova uno spirito affine in Blaze, un cavallo da corsa che si rifiuta di essere addomesticato.

programme.title: 101 Feelgood Rock Songs!
programme.desc: 8 hours of the biggest feel-good rock songs! With anthems from Bowie to Queen, Blink-182 to The Stones.

programme.title: College Campus Rocks! 1995-2010
programme.desc: These rebellious teens rocked every college campus throughout the 90s and 00s. Expect great tunes from Blink-182, Wheatus, Good Charlotte and many more!

programme.title: 20 Years Of Noise! The Class Of 06
programme.desc: 26 mega anthems that are 20 years old this year! All hail the great work from 2006, featuring Keane, The Arctic Monkeys, Fall Out Boy, The Zutons, My Chemical Romance & loads more!

programme.title: Rock Monsters! 2010-2019
programme.desc: A definitive selection of rock and indie anthems from the 2010s! Starting with My Chemical Romance in 2010 right through to Liam Gallagher at the end of the decade.

programme.title: Love Bites! With Nicky Horne
programme.desc: Nicky brings a masterclass in the most popular (& dangerous) subject in rock history! 20 songs loaded with lust, desire, breakups & despair - this is how love really does bite!

programme.title: Killer Cuts Of The 00s!
programme.desc: A decade of mega hits and the loudest anthems! Expect Biffy Clyro, Linkin Park, Blink 182, Evanescence, Fall Out Boy & loads more!

programme.title: 50 Rock Heroes of the 90s!
programme.desc: Claire Sturgess relives her 50 greatest rock heroes with the music that defined the 90s! Blur, Foo Fighthers, Oasis and Nirvana are all in the top 10 - but who is at number 1?

programme.title: The Anthems!
programme.desc: Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!

programme.title: Backtrack: Rock No.1s 2015-1980
programme.desc: In reverse: Starting in 2015, we're going back 35 rock years of number 1 hit singles & albums!

programme.title: The Anthems!
programme.desc: Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!

programme.title: Carol Decker's 80s Rock Dudes!
programme.desc: T'Pau's Carol Decker is back again with a countdown of 80s guys who liked to rock! With John Parr, Billy Idol, Guns n Roses & ZZ Top.

programme.title: Killer Cuts Of The 00s!
programme.desc: A decade of mega hits and the loudest anthems! Expect Biffy Clyro, Linkin Park, Blink 182, Evanescence, Fall Out Boy & loads more!

programme.desc: Claire Sturgess relives her 50 greatest rock heroes with the music that defined the 90s! Blur, Foo Fighthers, Oasis and Nirvana are all in the top 10 - but who is at number 1?

programme.title: The Anthems!
programme.desc: Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!

programme.title: Robin Banks 90s Antiques Rockshow
programme.desc: Crammed full with extraordinary finds, hidden treasures, and plenty of old relics! From the Stones and Genesis, to Iggy & Aerosmith - how many of these family heirlooms do you own?

programme.title: 90s Rock Anthems!
programme.desc: All 90s rock hits & power ballads! From Aerosmith, KISS & The Foo Fighters to The Stone Roses, Garbage & The Stereophonics. This is NOW Rock!

programme.title: Love Sucks! Good Riddance
programme.desc: Turn it up for an hour of high volume heartbreak! From Fleetwood Mac to Royal Blood, here are 12 essential anthems for the scorned & the broken in love!

programme.title: The Anthems!
programme.desc: Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!

programme.title: 40 Slightly Silly Rock Videos!
programme.desc: This a wild journey from 1967 to 2012 ranges from the hilariously absurd Electric Six, to playful parodies from Blink-182 and a random tree looking deer from Fall Out Boy!

programme.title: Killer Cuts Of The 00s!
programme.desc: A decade of mega hits and the loudest anthems! Expect Biffy Clyro, Linkin Park, Blink 182, Evanescence, Fall Out Boy & loads more!

programme.title: Monsters of Rock! 1990-1999
programme.desc: A definitive 6 hour marathon of 90s guitar anthems! From U2 to INXS, Blur to Bon Jovi, Skunk Anansie to Green Day, Metallica to Iron Maiden - 70 rock classics are here, in order!

programme.title: Alex Baker's 50 Rock Party Bangers
programme.desc: Alex Baker brings you the best, most sing-a-longable, rock party bangers of all time. If you love Green Day, The Foo Fighters, Bon Jovi and BMTH, then you are in for a treat!

programme.title: 40 Slightly Silly Rock Videos!
programme.desc: This a wild journey from 1967 to 2012 ranges from the hilariously absurd Electric Six, to playful parodies from Blink-182 and a random tree looking deer from Fall Out Boy!

programme.title: Talk of the Town! A-Z of the UK
programme.desc: From Aylesbury to Woking via Godalming & The Isle of Wight - where do your favourites 80s acts come from? We reveal all!

programme.title: Paul Young's 25 Classic Covers!
programme.desc: Paul Young, who sung 1 or 2 himself, brings you 25 classic 80s hits that were all covers, including Whitney, Madness, Billy Idol & Simply Red. Some will really surprise you!

programme.title: Endless Heavyness
programme.desc: Dive into pure power and unrelenting energy. Endless Heavyness is a non-stop wall of sound designed to hit hard and stay loud. No pauses, no compromises—just the most massive tracks to keep the momentum going. It’s not just loud; it’s eternal.

programme.title: Rock Bottom
programme.desc: Found your new baseline. Rock Bottom digs deep into the rawest hard rock and alt-anthems. We’re hitting the floor with heavy riffs and soulful grit—no shovels required, just volume. This is the foundation of everything that kicks.

programme.title: Manic Ritual
programme.desc: Lose yourself in the flickering shadows of distortion. A hypnotic sequence of sonic violence and dark imagery designed to unsettle the soul. Bow to the heavy. Welcome to the Manic Ritual.

programme.title: Flying V
programme.desc: Discover how the Flying V revolutionized Rock and Metal. Featuring icons from Metallica, Megadeth, Slayer, and Judas Priest, this documentary explores the history and secrets behind the world’s most unique guitar and the legends who play it.

programme.title: Where Heavy Music Lives
programme.desc: Your official gateway to the underground. Discover your first distorted riff or find a circle of peers who "get it." Welcome to the neighborhood—it’s loud, it’s proud, and there’s always room for one more.

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live in London - 40th Anniversary Concert
programme.desc: Witness a sold-out milestone at Shepherd’s Bush Theatre. Wishbone Ash marks 40 years with a career-spanning set of legends and new hits, plus special guests. It’s a high-energy celebration of guitar-driven rock history.

programme.title: Together We Rise
programme.desc: A tribute to the global brotherhood that refuses to fit in. This collection celebrates the unity that turns fans into a tribe. In this pit, no one stands alone—together, we are the loudest force on earth.

programme.title: The Home of Heavy
programme.desc: Step into the headquarters for everything that shakes the earth. From the pillars of the classics to the pioneers of the new era, this is where the heart of metal beats loudest. This is where you belong.

programme.title: Heavy Pumping
programme.desc: Ditch the pre-workout and let the riffs do the heavy lifting. This high-octane blast of speed and power is designed to fuel your gains or ignite a living room mosh pit. High BPMs, crushing drums, and zero excuses.

programme.title: For Metalheads Only
programme.desc: Leave the rock anthems at the door—this is 100% pure steel. We’ve dialed the distortion to eleven for a lineup strictly for the heavy-duty fans. No compromises, no fillers, just total sonic devastation.

programme.title: Wishbone Ash - Live In Hamburg
programme.desc: Recorded live in Hamburg, this 2007 concert features a high-voltage mix of new material and legendary classics. Experience the enduring power of a hard rock institution with over 30 years of history on the stage.

programme.title: New Rock And Metal Videos For You
programme.desc: Stay ahead of the curve with the freshest drops from the global underground. From world premieres to the latest studio masterpieces, we’ve gathered the newest sonic assaults in one place. If it’s loud and new, it’s here.

programme.title: Ritratto di chef S3
programme.desc: Giuseppe Lo Iudice - Alessandro Miocchi - Un ristorante, due chef, due amici che hanno in comune la passione per la trasformazione degli ingredienti in una esperienza per il palato

programme.title: Gambero Rosso
programme.desc: Rubrica

programme.title: Beker on tour S23
programme.desc: Carre di vitello aromatizzato - Fabrizio, Michele e le griglie protagonisti di questa ricetta: il lombo o carrè di vitello. Una carne nobile con molte proteine e pochi grassi.

programme.title: Le ricette dei food-metti
programme.desc: Metti un fumetto a cena con Cristiano Tomei. Lo chef dedica un piatto a ciascuno dei suoi fumetti preferiti.

programme.title: Parola di chef
programme.desc: Il punto di vista di un giovane talento della ristorazione italiana che si racconta svelando le proprie soddisfazioni, difficoltà, aspirazioni, in un percorso tra pubblico e privato.

programme.title: Dolcemente
programme.desc: S11 - Il volto dolce del Gambero Rosso, Maurizio Santin, ci insegna a realizzare dolci originali e creativi per deliziare il palato di tutti.

programme.title: Le grandi famiglie del vino
programme.desc: Santa Margherita - Di proprietà della famiglia Marzotto, questa azienda è il risultato di una grande intuizione, quella di Gaetano Marzotto di spumantizzare il prosecco, e la passione di chi oggi ne è alla guida.

programme.title: Max alla brace
programme.desc: S.2 - Max Mariola in cortile alle prese con un bbq. Ricette gustose e originali da realizzare nel giardino di casa o per passare qualche ora all’aperto

programme.title: Giorgione orto e cucina
programme.desc: Erbe spontanee - Le ricette di Giorgione per utilizzare al meglio le erbe che la natura offre spontaneamente.

programme.title: Vito con i suoi S8
programme.desc: Strudel Artusiano - Vito, Roberto e Lorenzo, 3 generazioni unite non solo da un vincolo di parentela ma dalla comune passione per la cucina. Tra manicaretti e ricette della tradizione uno sguardo divertente e divertito sulla famiglia Bicocchi.

programme.title: Mangio tutto tranne Haiti e Repubblica Dominicana
programme.desc: Ocoa Bay - Un progetto viticolo sulle coste del paese dove si produce vino. Unico vigneto in tutto il Caribe, questo è un progetto turistico che ha al centro di esso il vino. Poi c’è il caffè di cui la Repubblica Dominicana è grande produttore

programme.title: Mangio tutto tranne Haiti e Repubblica Dominicana
programme.desc: Bani Pedernales - Dopo Santo Domingo, Giovanni si dirige verso il confine con Haiti. Banì è la capitale del mango. Circa 30 sono le varietà di mango, diverse per forma, colore e sapore. Prossima tappa il mare di Pedernales

programme.title: Peppe Guiada Sei ricette in mezz'ora
programme.desc: Ep6 - La cucina è il regno di Peppe Guida. Che sia a Montechiaro o a Vico Equense, i suoi due regni, le ricette di Peppe sono un omaggio alla tradizione.

programme.title: Sardegna experience
programme.desc: Il viaggio di Luigi Pomata nella sua Sardegna, dall'entroterra al mare un caleidoscopio di sapori e saperi. Luoghi, persone e tradizioni che rendono unica questa isola

programme.title: L'isola del Barone S2
programme.desc: Linguina aglio nero e scorfano. Ritorna il Barone, Andrea Lo Cicero, con le ricette della sua amata Sicilia. Sapori inconfondibili che Andrea elabora mantenendone inalterato il legame con il territorio.

programme.title: Beker on tour S23
programme.desc: Carre di vitello aromatizzato - Fabrizio, Michele e le griglie protagonisti di questa ricetta: il lombo o carrè di vitello. Una carne nobile con molte proteine e pochi grassi.

programme.title: Parola di chef

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make a movie night meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: loaded turkey nachos, pizza flavored popcorn, spiced cucumber sticks, and chocolate covered pretzel sticks!

programme.title: Everyday Excellent
programme.desc: With only 30 minutes and the clock ticking, can Vanessa make a pool party meal for 4 for about 40 bucks? On the menu: grilled steak with chimichurri, spinach salad with pickled radish, and fruit salad with coconut and basil!

programme.desc: In under 30 minutes, chef Spencer Watts cooks up four hearty, rich, and mouth-watering French-Canadian dishes.

programme.title: Flour Power Spring Specials
programme.desc: An ode to Sunshine and Showers, this delectable Flour Power spring themed special inspires with three deliciously creative desserts. Charming host Jessica McGovern shows that spring showers bring decadent treats such as toasted hazelnut Mud Puddle Cookies and adorable Flower Pot Cupcakes that are sure to rejuvenate and bring new life to your kitchen!

programme.title: Flour Power Spring Specials
programme.desc: Coffee klatch is an old-fashioned tradition of gathering with your friends for coffee and conversation. In this sweet half-hour special, charming host Jessica McGovern pays tribute to this custom with three decadent and impressive desserts made with fragrant coffee

programme.title: Flour Power Spring Specials
programme.desc: Bring the sunshine to your kitchen with Flour Power's sweet half-hour spring special Birds and Bees! Inspired by chirping birds and buzzing bees, charming host Jessica McGovern bakes adorable desserts, including sweet and salty Bird's Nest Cookies and an ovERS-the-top Honey Apricot Dessert Tower drizzled in sticky goodness.

programme.title: Flour Power Spring Specials
programme.desc: Lace up your aprons and have the darling children join in on the fun as bubbly host Jessica McGovern inspires with creative and delicious Kid's Bake Sale recipes. Irresistible and easy-to-make, Jessica guides us through four baked goods that will sell faster than it'll take to make.

programme.title: Cook the Books
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud tries out recipes from another award-winning cookbook: Love Japan by Aaron Israel and Sawako Okochi with Gabriella Gershensen! programme.title: Spencer's Big 30

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: It's Tandoori Take-Out night as host Spencer Watts prepares five quick and easy Indian dishes that take little time, but are big in flavour.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: It's a bird, it's a plane, it's a day of great BBQ. Inspired by the aerial acrobatics of CF18's and Harvards, Matt cooks up a variety of poultry and fowl. The menu: Bacon Wrapped Quail Stuffed with 3 Cream Cheeses, Raspberry Chipotle Turkey Wings, Grilled Balsamic Marinated Duck Breast, and Deviled Eggs.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Whether you're a pro or a beginner, everyone is welcome to join the Road Grill team at the 19th tee where Matt is busy burnin' up his Q's. What better way to end your day at the links with an enticing menu of Miso Citrus Grilled Sablefish, Smoked Rack of Pork with a Sour Cherry Sauce , Lemon Basil Smashed Potatoes with Mushrooms, Arugula Salad with Peaches, and Blue Cheese and Walnuts.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: In between hoisting sails and scrubbing the deck, Matt and his team prepare a feast for the sailors before going on a long voyage. Not only is the weather perfect for sailing, it's perfect for BBQing! The menu: Scallop Corn Bacon Burger, Maple-apple Brined Pork Chops, Grilled Tuna Bruschetta, and Strawberry Marscapone Trifle.

programme.title: Road Grill
programme.desc: Teddy Bears of all age, shape, and size join our grill team with their owners for a day of games, rides and some teddy bear repair. programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Lisa Nguyen, a passionate and fun-loving Vietnamese home cook, introduces us to some of her favourite Vietnamese dishes with a French flare. Set in the colourful One World Kitchen 3 kitchen, Lisa assembles a classic Vietnamese sandwich. Golden-brown sautéed onions, salty bacon, tangy pickled carrots and daikon, and flavourful ground pork p'té pressed between two slices of crispy baguette will definitely get your mouth salivating. Next up, hot pork lathered in cognac inside a crunchy golden puff pastry. Moving away from pork, Lisa then cooks up a hearty plate of Shaking Beef with a leafy watercress salad on the side. Finally, Lisa shows us her Vietnamese play on a traditional French...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: What better way to start a meal than with dessert? Lebanese home cook Jasmin Ibrahim shows us how to make a gooey cheese pastry doused in sweet syrup called Knafeh. With a buttery golden-brown crust, oozy melted cheese and fragrant rose water, this decadent dessert will surely satisfy your sweet tooth. Next on the menu, a Lebanese classic - pita bread. You'll never buy it from the store again with this delightfully easy recipe! Jasmin then prepares a well-known Lebanese sandwich - you guessed it, Shawarma! Loaded with charred chicken, a popular Lebanese 7 spice mix, and yummy garlic sauce, this might be the best sandwich ever! Finally, Jasmin cooks up a batch of tasty Beirut Spicy Fish -...

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Greek home cook Joanna Chery kicks off this episode of One World Kitchen by showcasing popular recipes from Athens. She begins by preparing Chicken Souvlaki with Tzatziki, a classic dish featuring succulent, beautifully charred chicken skewers and a refreshing cucumber yogurt garlic dipping sauce. Next, she fries up some deliciously flaky cod with an irresitble garlic-potato dip, a staple recipe for Greece's Independence Day. Another popular dish in the Greek culture is Lamb Fricassee. It includes crispy, browned lamb pieces, juicy beef stock and a lovely egg - so savoury! Don't forget, we need a perfect dessert to follow a rich and hearty lamb dish: fried dough balls. Joanna shows us her...

programme.desc: Nothing wraps up a beach day like the glow of a campfire at sunset, with waves rolling in the distance.

programme.title: Nelson Lake & Te Anau Lake: New Zealand
programme.desc: Rolling hills, glacial lakes, vast skies, and forests and mountains make up the scenery of the Nelson and Te Anu lakes of New Zealand.

programme.title: Coral Kingdom
programme.desc: Arrangements of colorful coral sway to the rhythm of the tide, with aquatic visitors stopping by to enjoy the scenery.

programme.title: Lush Vineyards: Portugal
programme.desc: The jaw-droppingly beautiful Douro Valley, Portugal's most scenic wine regions.

programme.title: Atuh Beach: Indonesia
programme.desc: Take a tour of beautiful Indonesian waters, surrounded by impressive rock formations.

programme.title: Cadlao Lagoon: Philippines
programme.desc: Experiencing the beauty of a turquoise lagoon flanked by impressive, vegetation-covered, mountains.

programme.title: Pa'ako Beach, Hawaii, U.S
programme.desc: A new day dawns on Hawaii's Pa'ako beach as waves crash on the shore.

programme.title: New Chums Beach: New Zealand
programme.desc: New Chums Beach offers a unique and idyllic coastal experience, combining natural beauty, tranquility, and seclusion; it's the perfect backdrop for nature lovers seeking the peaceful and serene with tranquil ocean views.

programme.title: Cliffside Beach: Indonesia
programme.desc: The thrilling view of a cliff-top lookout of one of Indonesia's most breathtaking spots.

programme.title: Crashing Waves: Hawaii
programme.desc: The energizing sound of waves crashing on the shores of Hawaii's Red Sand Beach.

programme.title: Above the Rocky Mountains
programme.desc: Showcasing one of the world's most famous mountain ranges, Banff National Park, from a higher perspective and is paired with healing music and subtle real-life nature sounds; soaring over places like Lake Louise and more from the Canadian Rockies.

programme.title: Lake Brunner & Paringa: New Zealand
programme.desc: Exploring a lakeside getaway.

programme.title: Kapas Biru Waterfall: Indonesia
programme.desc: Escape to Indonesia with tropical vegetation and a rushing waterfall.

programme.title: Beneath the Sea
programme.desc: A look at a compilation of spectacular underwater images from around the world.

programme.title: Magical Mcway Cove
programme.desc: The sights and sounds of Big Sur.

programme.title: A Day on the Napali Coast
programme.desc: An ambient nature film features the sights and sounds of the 11-mile Kalalau Trail on the Hawaiian island of Kauai.

programme.title: Above the Tulip Fields
programme.desc: Tulip fields as seen from a drone perspective in the windmill-filled country of Holland.

programme.title: Crystal Waterfalls of Croatia
programme.desc: The Plitvice Lakes National Park.

programme.title: Cascading waterfall: Indonesia
programme.desc: Take a trip through the Indonesian jungle to a remote waterfall cascading over a natural cave.

programme.title: Kabut Pelangi Waterfall: Indonesia
programme.desc: Traveling to East Java and experiencing a waterfall tucked deep in the lush forest.

programme.title: Glacial Beauty: Newfoundland
programme.desc: Admiring the quiet and glacial beauty of icebergs drifting across the bay at Newfoundland's Amherst Cove.

programme.title: A Day in San Diego
programme.desc: Featuring 12 different 15-minute scenes from the San Diego's beaches, Coronado Beach, Pacific Beach, Mission Beach, Blacks Beach, Ocean Beach, Sunset Cliffs, Torrey Pines and more.

programme.title: Nassau Marina: Bahamas
programme.desc: Experiencing the tranquil waters of a laid-back marina tucked away in the Bahamas.

programme.title: Lakeside Campfire: Quebec
programme.desc: Listening to the elegance and warmth of the crackling fire in Entrelacs, Quebec.

programme.title: Tutoko River: New Zealand
programme.desc: Rushing waters through rocky rapids.

programme.title: New Plymouth Beaches: New Zealand
programme.desc: Home to the iconic Paritutu Rock, these beaches boast lush native forests, ocean swells, and coast-lining cliffs.

programme.title: Dolphin Voyage Relaxation
programme.desc: Underwater cinematography, a synergistic blend of audio including underwater nature sounds, and calming ambient music combine to induce relaxtion in the deep blue calming ocean with a pod of friendly dolphins.

programme.title: Moraine Lake Relaxation
programme.desc: Moraine Lake in Banff National Park.

programme.title: Auckland Beaches: New Zealand
programme.desc: The relaxing vibe of a day at the beach, with a tour of the breathtaking coastlines near Auckland.

programme.title: A Day in San Diego
programme.desc: Featuring 12 different 15-minute scenes from the San Diego's beaches, Coronado Beach, Pacific Beach, Mission Beach, Blacks Beach, Ocean Beach, Sunset Cliffs, Torrey Pines and more.

programme.title: Lombok Beaches: Indonesia
programme.desc: Experiencing the beaches of an Indonesian island set to a peaceful soundtrack.

programme.title: Ninety Mile Beach: New Zealand
programme.desc: The almost never-ending paradise of one of New Zealand's most breathtaking beaches.

programme.title: A Day in the Caribbean
programme.desc: The tropical island of Antigua.

programme.title: Diamond Beach I: Indonesia
programme.desc: An immersion into turquoise waters and a rocky coastline in Bali, Indonesia.

programme.title: Above the Fiji Islands
programme.desc: Featuring aerial views of remote South Pacific islands, accompanied by nature sounds and ambient music by Relax Moods; offering a mix of ground-level and bird's-eye perspectives through smooth, continuous shots, concluding with a real-time sunset over the sea.

programme.title: Lake Mclaren: New Zealand
programme.desc: Views of ducks swimming on a lake, surrounded by green vegetation.

programme.title: Lush Vineyards: Portugal
programme.desc: The jaw-droppingly beautiful Douro Valley, Portugal's most scenic wine regions.

programme.title: Moalboal White Beach: Philippines
programme.desc: Exploring the Basdaku Beach.

programme.title: Algarve: Portugal
programme.desc: Relax along the coastal cliffs in Portugal with this stunning 4K ambient nature film showcasing the stunning sandstone cliffs, glistening blue waters, peaceful waves and birds flying.

programme.title: Earth From Above
programme.desc: Traveling the world with a birds-eye-view perspective of scenic wonders.

programme.title: Wairere Falls: New Zealand
programme.desc: The Wairere Falls of New Zealand.

programme.title: Enchanting Gorge: Finger Lakes -- Finger Lakes, New York
programme.desc: Find your inner peace admiring a waterfall cascading into a gorge in New York's Finger Lakes region.

programme.title: Kapas Biru Waterfall: Indonesia
programme.desc: Escape to Indonesia with tropical vegetation and a rushing waterfall.

programme.title: Lombok Beaches: Indonesia
programme.desc: Experiencing the beaches of an Indonesian island set to a peaceful soundtrack.

programme.title: A Day in Santorini
programme.desc: A visual journey through the coastal village of Oia, found on the far tip of Santorini Island.

programme.title: Nature Relaxation Journey Part 1
programme.desc: Part 1 of a 2-hour feature length film with soothing music which gently sweeps viewers on a journey to breathtaking destinations throughout Argentina, Bolivia, Canada, Chile, Mexico, and throughout California, Hawaii, Oregon, and Utah.

programme.title: Blue Horizons
programme.desc: Featuring a diverse set of blue nature scenes from places like Hawaii, Mexico, Canada and California paired with a custom ambient track by Travis Revell.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Italy's quintessential charms survive in its classic hill towns. From San Gimignano's medieval towers to Civita di Bagnoregio's cliff-hanging vistas, all sit on lofty stone perches that now protect them only from the modern world.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine EP 13
programme.desc: Embrace the joy of homemade comfort. Bombes, the golden Cypriot sweet fried dough pastries with a crispy exterior and a fluffy interior, are prepared by Chryso Lefou. She continues with a potato au gratin that has been baked to perfection for a rich, savoury finish, and is layered with cold cuts and cheese. A delightful combination of hearty indulgence and sweet tradition.

programme.title: MED Destination ANTIPAROS
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Destination - Dubrovnik
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Destination - Dubrovnik
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Memoirs 14 May
programme.desc: Memoirs 14 May

programme.title: Med Nations 15 Montenegro
programme.desc: Uncover the hidden treasures of Montenegro, where rugged mountains meet the sparkling Adriatic. From the mediaeval charm of Kotor to serene bays and vibrant seaside villages, Montenegro offers a striking mix of natural beauty, rich history, and authentic Mediterranean culture.

programme.title: MedMinds 04 Leonardo Da Vinci
programme.desc: Leonardo da Vinci, the curious mind of the Renaissance, embodied genius with an insatiable thirst for discovery.

programme.title: Tourism a wistful bizerte
programme.desc: Discover Bizerte’s sustainable tourism through the artistry of Berber pottery, handcrafted by local women. This initiative not only preserves centuries-old traditions but also empowers communities with vital income, all within the breathtaking landscapes and rich cultural tapestry of the region.

programme.title: MED Destination ANTIPAROS
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: MED Destination ITHAKA
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Destinations Pula
programme.desc: Discover Pula, Croatia, with Med Destinations. Famous for its Roman amphitheater and charming old town, Pula combines historical grandeur with Adriatic seaside beauty.

programme.title: Outdoor and Nature

The performance highlights a powerful blend of passion and precision.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Lisbon
programme.desc: Malini Angelica explores Lisbon, the vibrant capital of Portugal. Once founded by the Phoenicians and shaped by Romans, Moors, and explorers of the Golden Age, Lisbon’s layered history is reflected in its culture and charm. During her visit, the city comes alive with the Festas Populares de Lisboa — a June celebration of Saint Anthony filled with music, dancing, and barbecued sardines. Malini samples local favorites like grilled sardines, bifanas, and the famous pastel de nata, and experiences the soulful beauty of Fado music. Lisbon’s warmth, flavor, and festive spirit show why it remains one of Europe’s most beloved cities.

programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Casablanca
programme.desc: A lot of people say Casablanca isn’t worth visiting and that you should head straight to Marrakesh or Fez — but Malini Angelica completely disagrees! In this video, she explores Morocco’s most authentic city and discovers where Europe meets Africa in a fascinating blend of culture, history, and architecture. It’s not overrun with tourists, it’s 100% real, and it ended up being her favorite city in Morocco!

programme.title: Origini
programme.desc: Valentina Caruso and Francesco Gasparri explore the Strait of Messina, where unique underwater currents create an oceanic ecosystem within the Mediterranean. Diver Domenico Majolino and marine biologist Simona Ratti explain its natural wonders, while Vincenzo Annuario tells the story of the Cariddi ferry, reborn after serving in the navy. At the National Archaeological Museum of Reggio Calabria, we discover the legacy of Magna Grecia and the famous Riace Bronzes. The 1908 earthquake that devastated Messina and Reggio Calabria is commemorated at the Regional Museum of Messina with the exhibition "1908 City Museum".

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: With its thought-provoking sights, delicious cuisine, and idyllic coastline, it's no wonder Normandy is both a Mecca for history buffs and a popular getaway for Parisians.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Ramadan
programme.desc: Malini Angelica visits Morocco during Ramadan, the holiest month for Muslims. She joins locals in Marrakech and the Berber village of Imlil for the traditional Iftar meal, the breaking of the fast. Experiencing Morocco during Ramadan offers a special glimpse into its rich culture and traditions, as the country comes alive with community, spirituality, and celebration.

programme.title: The Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: The tale of Zeus and the Conquest of Power begins with the overthrow of his father, Cronus, who devoured his children to prevent a prophecy. Hidden at birth, Zeus grows strong and returns to free his siblings from Cronus’s belly. Together, they wage a mighty war against the Titans, emerging victorious. Zeus claims the throne of Olympus, marking the rise of the Olympian gods and the triumph of order over chaos.

programme.title: Madame Butterfly Teatro Alla Scala 2016
programme.desc: In Madama Butterfly (Teatro alla Scala, 2016), a young Japanese woman enters into a marriage with an American naval officer, filled with hope for a new life. As time passes, the contrast between her expectations and reality becomes more profound. The opera unfolds with deep emotional intensity, leading to a powerful and poignant conclusion.

programme.title: Concerto - Schubert e Strauss per Mariotti e OSN
programme.desc: The Rai National Symphony Orchestra, under the baton of conductor Michele Mariotti, presents a captivating performance featuring the works of Franz Schubert and Richard Strauss. The programme showcases Schubert's rich melodies and lyrical compositions alongside Strauss's dynamic and expressive pieces, offering a journey through the Romantic and late-Romantic musical landscapes. The orchestra's interpretation highlights the depth and emotional power of these renowned composers, creating a memorable concert experience.

programme.title: 10 Days Cyprus
programme.desc: Lying next to the island's beautiful Mediterranean coastline, in south-western Cyprus, the popular town of Paphos is home to some spectacular archaeological attractions and a rich Cypriot history. Here, Sabrina discovers the myths of the Greek and Roman philosophies, unravels the stories hidden in time at Paphos Archaeological Park, and explores the historic towns of Limassol and Kourion.

programme.title: 10 Days Cyprus
programme.desc: From being the primary mode of transport for many centuries to helping in the production of olive oil, the donkeys in Cyprus have truly earned the status of the national animal. Our host, Sabrina Chakici finds out more about them and their significance to the country when she visits a donkey farm. She also visits Akamas Peninsula National Park, one of the island country’s last remaining wildernesses.

programme.title: City Breaks
programme.desc: Valencia, the birthplace of paella, has got the bones of a metropolis and the heart of a quaint seaside town. Alex Outhwaite experiences this when she visits the strikingly futuristic City Of Arts And Sciences and then tries the local specialty, Pinxtos at a Tapas Bar and enjoys Valencia’s laidback charms at El Cabanyal Beach. She also encounters the city’s strong Catholic roots at Cathedral de Valencia, the alleged home of the Holy Grail used by Christ at the Last Supper.

programme.title: Xp guide
programme.desc: The clear blue sea, the white sparkling sands and the sun kissing your skin, Mauritius is what dreams are made of.

programme.title: 10 Days Cyprus
programme.desc: Larnaca in Cyprus is one of the world’s 20 most ancient, continuously inhabited cities for the last 4000 years. Travel enthusiast, Sabrina sets out to find out more about the city but is waylaid when she finds a flock of flamingos at a lake side.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.desc: In Banff, Alex tries pizza, Smoked Buffalo Flatbread and beer.

programme.title: Boarding Pass

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: Luxurious hotels, thrilling water parks, inexpensive food and almost 300 days of bright sunny weather make Bulgaria’s biggest seaside resort, Sunny Beach popular for budget beach getaways. Catriona, however, stumbles onto the historic town of Nessebar, which is over 3000 years old, and realizes that there is more to the place than meets the eye. She goes on to visit the Castra Rubra winery, where she finds out about the history of Viticulture in Bulgaria and the process of wine making.
